title: Tick Control in Borough Park, Brooklyn | $125–$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Borough Park, Brooklyn. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease. Licensed technicians, same-day service. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Borough Park residents face increasing tick exposure in local parks, backyards, and green spaces throughout this vibrant Brooklyn neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services to protect your family and pets from tick-borne illnesses including Lyme disease. Our licensed technicians deliver safe, effective treatments tailored to Borough Park's unique residential landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Borough Park families for years with proven tick elimination methods and preventative treatments. Our technicians understand the specific tick challenges in Brooklyn neighborhoods and use EPA-approved products safe for children, pets, and the environment.
localContext: Borough Park's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Fourteenth Avenue Park and Abraham Lincoln Playground, and densely packed residential areas with small yards create ideal tick habitats. The neighborhood's many multi-family homes, Orthodox Jewish community centers, and bustling commercial corridors require specialized pest control approaches that respect both property types and community standards.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Borough Park?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Borough Park typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, ticks can be active during warmer winter days, so year-round vigilance is important for Brooklyn residents.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Borough Park?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Borough Park range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer free inspections and customized treatment plans to fit your specific needs and budget.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping kids and pets inside during application and allowing 2-4 hours for products to dry before resuming normal yard activities.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule tick control treatments?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection in Borough Park, we recommend monthly treatments during peak tick season (April-October) or quarterly treatments for year-round prevention. Properties near parks or with heavy vegetation may benefit from more frequent applications.
